ItacAcademyItem.Name: Gelati (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: A wood of trees covered with ice
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: List of members of the Academy is in Memorie Imprese e Ritratti de’ Signori Accademici Gelati di Bologna (Bologna, 1672) and Leggi dell’Accademia de’ Sig[nori] Gelati di Bologna (Bologna, 1683). Biographical information are in Fantuzzi, Notizie degli scrittori bolognesi (1784). --- Giorgio Stabile refers to a letter mentioning the Accademia dei Gelati as early as 1558, see Stabile, `Betti Claudio, detto Betto il Giovane`, in DBI. --- Explanation of the Academy`s emblem, is in Zoppio, Consolatione di Melchiorre Zoppio, filosofo morale, nella morte della moglie, Olimpia Luna Z. (1603). --- For the Gelati`s interest in theatre, see Marina Calore, `La biblioteca drammatica delgi Accademici Gelati di Bologna`, in Atti della Accademia delle scienze dell`Istituto di Bologna , Classe di scienze morali, Rendiconti, 1992-1993, pp. 61-82. --- For a history of the Accademia in the late XVII c., see Bergamini, `Dai Gelati alla Renia (1670-1698). Appunti per una storia delle accademie letterarie bolognesi`, in La Colonia Renia: profilo documentario e critico dell’Arcadia bolognese, ed. Mario Saccenti 2 vols (Modena: 1988). Publications related tot he Academy, but not in British Library catalogue, include: Encomia iurisprudentiae solemnia Paulus Maccius Acad. Gelat. In Archigymnasio Bononiae dicebat. Et Illustrissimo D. Augustino Marsilio Senat. dicabat... (1633); Nerei vaticinium de raptu Helenae Apellaea Guidonis Rheni arte depicto. Paulus Maccius in Academia Gelatorum Defessus describebat, Emanuelique Vizanio adolescenti Latinarum, Graecarumque litterarum studiosissimo, ... donabat (Bononiae : typis Clementis Ferronij, 1633 (Bononiae, Kalen. Februarij [1 II] 1633); Cruentum divae Martinae virginis et martyris in Verba Christi Iuramentum Paullus Maccius in Academia Gelatorum defessus scribebat, et illistrissimis Bononiensis Reipublicae Senatoribus dicabat (Bononiae: typis Clementis Ferronij, 1635); Lo sposalizio della terra col Cielo per l`Immacolata Concezione della Verg. Orazione panegirica di Paolo Emilio Fantucci senatore bolognese, recitata dal medesimo nel tempio di S. Francesco di Bologna nell`occasione della solita accademia dell`Immacolata Concezione (Bologna: presso Gio. Battista Ferroni, 1658); Accademia dei Gelati, Componimenti dispensati nella publica adunanza de gli Academici Gelati per le nozze del sig.r Tolomeo Duglioli il Dedito e della S.ra Maria Barberini (In Bologna: per Bartolomeo Cochi, 1618?)

ItacPersonItem.Name: Pepoli,Giovanni,Count,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Plant half covered in snow?; blossoming flowers; thorns

ItacPersonItem.Name: Guidotti,Carlo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Six stars; deserted landscape

ItacPersonItem.Name: Marescalchi,Vincenzo Maria,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A horse shoe on a slope

ItacPersonItem.Name: Pepoli,Guido,Count | Marquis,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A swan? drinking dew from a tree

ItacPersonItem.Name: Malvezzi,Floriano,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A hut in the middle of a wood

ItacPersonItem.Name: Gozzadini,Ulisse Giuseppe,Cardinal,1650-1728
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Fox on the bank of a frozen river judges whether it is prudent to cross the river by listening the water under the ice

ItacPersonItem.Name: Pepoli,Ugo Giuseppe,Count,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A broken spear? Stuck into the ground with branches and leaves

ItacPersonItem.Name: Malvezzi,Roberto,Abbot,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A winged horse at the bottom of an iced mountain

ItacPersonItem.Name: Amadio,Carlo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A pruned tree

ItacPersonItem.Name: Casali,Lodovico,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: An oyster with two pearls inside

ItacPersonItem.Name: Gornia,Giovan Battista,,1633-1684
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A pumpkin

ItacPersonItem.Name: Graziani,Girolamo,Count,1604-1674
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A horse attempting to proceed?

ItacPersonItem.Name: Griffoni,Matteo,Count,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: An animal inside a cave

ItacPersonItem.Name: De` Riccardi d`Ortona,Federico,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: An old tower the top is ruined

ItacPersonItem.Name: Grimaldi,Lorenzo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A polar bear? in a deserted landscape

ItacPersonItem.Name: Manzi,Giovanni Galeazzo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A yoke hanging from a bare tree

ItacPersonItem.Name: Mariani,Mario,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Eight-points star over sea and land

ItacPersonItem.Name: degli Obizzi,Pio Enea,Marquis,1592-1674
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A larva transforming in butterfly

ItacPersonItem.Name: Orsi,Francesco,Count,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A constellation in the sky with a bear?

ItacPersonItem.Name: Orsi,Giovanni,Count,
ItacPersonItem.Motto: Quo magis gelat inde clarior lucet
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A bear representing the constellation

ItacPersonItem.Name: Pierizzi,Paolo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A field of grass covered in snow

ItacPersonItem.Name: Ratta Garganelli,Giuseppe Carlo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: An eagle?; bare trees and a village

ItacPersonItem.Name: Redi,Francesco,,1626-1698
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A rabbit on a mountain

ItacPersonItem.Name: Sacchetti,Urbano,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A stoat

ItacPersonItem.Name: Santagata,Simone,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Bees flying in and out a beehive inside a dead trunk

ItacPersonItem.Name: Santinelli,Francesco Maria,Marquis | Count,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Clouds; rain; wind over a field

ItacPersonItem.Name: Schönleben,Giovanni Lodovico,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A plant inside a tabernacle

ItacPersonItem.Name: Severoli,Nicola,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Animal with woolf head bird beak dog body wings and bird front paws

ItacPersonItem.Name: Tenti,Bernardino,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A tree with leaves in a deserted landscape

ItacPersonItem.Name: Venenti,Giulio Cesare,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Active Mongibello (Etna)

ItacPersonItem.Name: Zani,Valerio,Count, - 1696
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A frozen fountain and bare trees in the distance

ItacPersonItem.Name: Zoppio,Cesare,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A vase with flowers (roses?) under the snow

ItacPersonItem.Name: Ranuzzi,Annibale,Count,1625-?
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A star amidst clouds above a stormy sea

ItacPersonItem.Name: Castelli,Giovanni Paolo,,1646-?
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Tower with a branch growing from the left angle

ItacPersonItem.Name: Fontana Bombelli,Pompeo,,1613-?
ItacPersonItem.Motto: Benche gelida sia gorgoglia e bolle
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A fountain

ItacPersonItem.Name: Baldi,Girolamo Camillo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Pine cone

ItacPersonItem.Name: Capponi,Giovanni,,1586-1629
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: An eagle flies out of a bush

ItacPersonItem.Name: Turchi,Giovanni,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Snow ball

ItacPersonItem.Name: Gessi,Berlingiero (juniore),Senator,1613-1671
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A sledge

ItacPersonItem.Name: Fabretti,Vincenzo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A tree on top of a rock

ItacPersonItem.Name: Zabarella,Giacomo,Count (The Younger),1599 - 1679
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A fire in front of a carpet

ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A tree with bees

ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A chariot

ItacPersonItem.Name: Caprara,Alberto,,1627-1691
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Falling rain transformed in snow

ItacPersonItem.Name: Cospi,Angelo,,1603-1671
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A ship in stormy water

ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: An arrow directed from the sea to the cloudy sky

ItacPersonItem.Name: Zani,Andrea,Count | Marquis,?1651
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A pyramid made of poles open on one side?

ItacPersonItem.Name: Litta,Alfonso,Cardinal,1608
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Snow flakes and a hammer? turned upside down and snow on the ground

ItacPersonItem.Name: Capponi,Giovambattista,,1620 - 1675
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A bird looking at a tree charged with leaves

ItacPersonItem.Name: Carmeni,Francesco,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A thermometer?

ItacPersonItem.Name: Berò,Ercolagostino,Count,1623-1696
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: The juniper tree

ItacPersonItem.Name: Bonomi,Giovanfrancesco,,1626-1705
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A tree covered with snow

ItacPersonItem.Name: Fioravanti,Innocenzio Maria,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A plant in the forefront a valley in the background and a tree on the right hand side

ItacPersonItem.Name: Marsili,Antonio Felice,,1649-1710
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A river with many twists

ItacPersonItem.Name: Sanuti Pellicani,Giovan Battista,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: stream; mountain; winged horse; dog

ItacPersonItem.Name: Desideri,Girolamo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Log; hammer; wood chisel

ItacPersonItem.Name: Guastavillani,Angelo Michele,Senator,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Rose tree; flower-bed

ItacPersonItem.Name: Contenti,Giorgio,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Dragon killed by a spear

ItacPersonItem.Name: Balzani,Paolo Emilio,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Two fauns hold the stripe of the motto below there is a Pan flute attached to a trunk

ItacPersonItem.Name: Barbieri,Alessandro,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Hunting dog

ItacPersonItem.Name: Bombaci,Gasparo,Count,1607-1676
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Ursa minor

ItacPersonItem.Name: Caccianemici,Francesco Maria,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Light inside a dark cave

ItacPersonItem.Name: Turchi,Niccolò Zoppio,,1609-1656
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A machine for lifting weights

ItacPersonItem.Name: Coradino,Nicolò,,1573 - 1624
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: deer poisoning snake cold water

ItacPersonItem.Name: Pepoli,Romeo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Five bare poles? and one with a sphere on top

ItacPersonItem.Name: Campeggi,Ridolfo,Count,1565-1624
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: The instrument for polishing and shining swords

ItacPersonItem.Name: L`Involto,L`Involto,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A hand covered by a cloth; below is a river flowing from a mountain across the woods

ItacPersonItem.Name: Marescotti,Ercole,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Sphere-constellation-zodiac-initials M and S

ItacPersonItem.Name: Bentivogli,Carlo,Count,1615-1661
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Mount Etna where flames are close to the ice

ItacPersonItem.Name: Testa,Lelio,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Two arms holding a sword and a cloth

ItacPersonItem.Name: Crasso,Lorenzo,,1623
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Ivy growing around a dead trunk

ItacPersonItem.Name: Barberini,Francesco,Cardinal ,1597-1679
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Bushes without leaves and mountains covered with snow in the background

ItacPersonItem.Name: Maurizzi,Giovanni Battista,,?1635
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Vine full of unripe grape exposed to the rising sun

ItacPersonItem.Name: Marescotti,Agesilao,,?1618
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Difficult to decipher: a wall that is whiter on one side and darker on the other; a mop and a bucket (the tools of the decorator?)

ItacPersonItem.Name: Gessi,Camillo,Senator,1571-1635
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Lighthouse

ItacPersonItem.Name: Zoppio,Melchiorre,,1544-1634/7
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Mock sun in misty cloud

ItacPersonItem.Name: Montalbani,Ovidio,,c. 1600
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Tree with grafts

ItacPersonItem.Name: Battista,Giuseppe,,1610-1675
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A contracted snake

ItacPersonItem.Name: Bellisomi,Agostino,Marquis,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A tree without leaves above which is a goat (Aries?) a jug of water (wine?) and fish

ItacPersonItem.Name: Gessi,Cesare,,1568
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Plant blossoming from top of a spear

ItacPersonItem.Name: Severi,Severo,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Two ice skates on the surface of a lake

ItacPersonItem.Name: Malvezzi,Virgilio,Marquis,1595-1654
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A breastplate an helmet and a shield hanging from the branches of a tree

ItacPersonItem.Name: Bentivogli,Ippolito,Count | Marquis,
ItacPersonItem.Motto: Sistunt ut marmore (from Ovid 10th Elegy `De Tristibus`)
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A ship stuck into a frozen river

ItacPersonItem.Name: Montanari,Geminiano,,1633 - 1687
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Globe with the constellation Ursa Mayor

ItacPersonItem.Name: Bentivogli,Ulisse,Marquis,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A ship with a torch on top of the master representing the Luce di Sant`Ermo

ItacPersonItem.Name: Facchinetti,Lodovico,Marquis,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: River

ItacPersonItem.Name: Facchinetti,Giovanni Antonio,Pope Innocent IX,1519-1591
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: An ice-axe at the bottom of a mountain

ItacPersonItem.Name: Facchinetti,Lodovico,Marquis ,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A tree on the edge of stream

ItacPersonItem.Name: dalla Valle,Alfonso,Marquis,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Constellation of the Capricorn

ItacPersonItem.Name: Nanni Fantuzzi,Ippolito,,ca. 1609 - 1677
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Elephant crossing a stream

ItacPersonItem.Name: Facchinetti,Giovanni Antonio (Jr.),Cardinal,1575 - 1606
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Tree half in blossom

ItacPersonItem.Name: Marsili,Cesare,,
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Pleiades

ItacPersonItem.Name: Muscettola,Antonio,,1628 - 1679
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Bare tree - nest - two birds

ItacPersonItem.Name: Faberi,Lucio,,1550s - 1610
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A tree against a wood in the background

ItacPersonItem.Name: Manzini,Carlo Antonio,Count,1600-1677
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: Ivy growing around a trunk

ItacPersonItem.Name: Cospi,Ferdinando,,1606-1686
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A thermometer

ItacPersonItem.Name: Facchinetti,Cesare,Cardinal,1608 - 1683
ItacPersonItem.PersonEmblemDescription: A field with flowers and a mountain partially covered with snow

ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
